summary: Card enhancement features testing completed successfully. All P0 features working: due date color-coding (red=overdue, orange=today, gray=future), priority badges, named labels, assigned members on card previews, card detail modal with all sections. Backend API tests: 20/21 passed (95%). Frontend UI fully functional.

minor.issue: Cannot set priority to null/None - the update logic skips None values, so clearing priority is not possible
minor.fix: In server.py line 1093, change logic to allow explicit null values for optional fields like priority

passed_tests: Due date color-coding on card previews - red for overdue, orange for today, gray for future ✓
Priority badges on card previews - Low/Medium/High/Urgent with correct colors ✓
Labels showing correctly on card previews as colored strips ✓
Assigned member avatars showing on card previews ✓
Card detail modal opens with all sections ✓
Labels section - named labels with remove and add functionality ✓
Assigned Members section - shows members with Invite button ✓
Due Date section - calendar picker with color-coded status ✓
Priority section - 4-button selector (Low/Medium/High/Urgent) ✓
Description section - textarea available ✓
Attachments section - Upload File button present ✓
Checklist section - add items, toggle completion, progress bar ✓
Comments section - add comments with timestamps ✓
Card-level member invitation - existing user adds directly ✓
Card-level member invitation - unregistered user creates pending invite ✓
Named labels - can add labels with custom names ✓
Priority selector - can set all priority levels ✓
Checklist - can add items and toggle completion ✓
Comments - can add comments ✓
Board access and card data retrieval ✓
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix priority clearing - update PATCH /cards endpoint to allow setting priority to null (line 1091-1097 in server.py)
critical_code_review_comments: Due date color logic in BoardPage.js (lines 46-60) is well implemented with proper date normalization
CardDetailModal.js has all required sections and proper API integrations
Card invite endpoint correctly handles both existing and non-existing users
Pending invite processing on registration is working (verified via test data)
seed_data_creation: Test data exists: 3 cards with different due dates (overdue: card_da16e8e57260, today: card_58ddcbb322ce, future: card_e4bbbfa0692b). Future card has named labels. Checklist items and comments added during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card enhancement features fully tested. All P0 requirements verified. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_card_features.py can be reused. Test board at board_8b24ee8c579c has 3 test cards with various configurations. Only minor issue: cannot clear priority via API (low priority fix).

due_date_color_coding.details: Red for overdue, orange for today, gray for future - all verified in UI and backend

priority_badges.details: Low (green), Medium (yellow), High (orange), Urgent (red) badges showing on card previews

named_labels.details: Labels support both color and name fields, editable in modal

assigned_members_on_preview.details: Member avatars display on card previews, limited to 3 with +N indicator

card_detail_modal.details: All 8 sections present: Labels, Members, Due Date, Priority, Description, Attachments, Checklist, Comments

card_level_invitation.details: Existing users added directly, unregistered users get pending invite processed on signup

checklist.details: Add items, toggle completion, progress bar, count indicator all working

comments.details: Add comments with user name and timestamp, displayed in card modal
